mentions.note: Has finally shown momentum after years of stagnation; people who avoided it are now stepping in inch by inch. Buy on this momentum.
Stock finally has momentum after years of people staying away. Inch by inch, step by step going higher. People who waited to buy for years now saying 'not without me.' Take the over; buy it.
Finally showing momentum after years of stalling. People have been waiting to buy it; now breaking higher. Cramer: take the over, buy into the strength.

Finally has momentum after years of sideways trading. People who've been staying away now chasing higher. Mark's $69 cost basis well below current levels. Buy the breakout as investors capitulate to uptrend.
Stock finally showing momentum after years of languishing. Callers waited to buy; now it's going higher. Take the over; don't sell at $69.
Cut in half over 6 months; weak Q4 guidance; losing market share to prediction markets; downtrend continues; stay away until turnaround clear.
Struggling from lack of consolidation; needs California, Florida, Texas to change gambling rules; low valuation reflects no good and whole lot of bad; need new people to help open accounts.
Likes the business but without Florida, Texas, California licenses, company 'in the wilderness'; not expensive but needs major consolidation catalyst or state regulatory breakthroughs.
Needs Texas, California, Florida legalization to advance; stock stalled until those states approve; regulatory catalyst-dependent.
